'''Soy Pods''' is an item harvested from [[Soy Beans|Soy Crops]].

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Soy pods.png
| id = soy_pods
| type = Farming
| Subtype = Soy
| stackable = 64
| Description = Right-click to unpod the beans.
}}

== Obtaining ==

=== Farming ===

* You can harvest 1-3 Soy Pods per fully grown Soy Crop.

== Used In ==

* [[Dried Soy Pods]]
* [[Edamame]]

== Usage ==

* '''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.

== Trivia ==

* It was added in DTN 1.18.0
